cards.name: Ace of Cups
cards.interpretation: love, new feelings, emotional awakening, creativity, spirituality, intuition

cards.name: 2 of Wands, reversed
cards.interpretation: bad planning, overanalyzing, not taking action, playing it safe, avoiding risk

cards.name: 10 of Wands, reversed
cards.interpretation: failure to delegate, shouldering too much responsibility, collapse, breakdown
